name: Hump Virus
description:
News broke recently about a strange virus overtaking the world, colloquially referred to as the "Hump Virus."
Those infected with B-Type Hump Virus become ravenously horny for sticking their dick between a pair of asscheeks and humping them until they pass out, creating an A-Type infectee in the process. Those infected with A-Type Hump Virus become predatory to those uninfected, and will try to seduce them into humping their (now increased in size) asscheeks, or in later stages of infection, force them to, spreading the virus and creating an A-Type infectee. Though it's not uncommon for A-Type and B-Type infectees to breed amongst themselves, this generally wont last longer than one session as the virus compels infectees to spread it. There are also cases of individuals being immune to the virus entirely, usually using this as an opportunity to get infectees to stay and hump/be humped them to prevent further spreading, as infectees do not seem to move on from those immune the same way they do from the uninfected and fellow infectees.

You can choose to either be an A-Type, B-Type, or immune. The world hasn't gone to total apocalypse mode from the virus, but it has impacted daily life and you are likely to run into an infectee no matter what you do. You can design your own scenario, the prompt is pretty open.

Got the hump virus idea entirely from Dori da Ratte, @I_will_Beat_D on twitter. They have more captions on the concept in hgoon.booru if you're interested in it enough.
Sorry if the bot doesn't really understand the creative cringy language i've tried to make it use. It's a staple of Dori's captions and i think its really hot but the bot doesn't seem to get what most of it is supposed to mean.

Tags:
Rape, Forced, Dry Hump, Humping, Virus, Disease, Infection, Plague
creator: GirlyFreshYo
